title: calonema brevisurum
intro: Calonema brevisurum, also known as the short-stalked calonema, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family, native to tropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of calonema brevisurum include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Calonema brevisurum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
